title: 3D Mace But Bare Bones
description: Remake 3D Mace to Bare Bone Style
body:
**Many players including myself were disappointed when they found out the mace wasn't going to have a 3D model in 1.21. Well this resource-pack fixes that. Mace but 3D is a resource-pack that adds a clean 3D model to the mace. The custom model appears only while holding it, giving it a more vanilla feel.**

![Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02d4afbaafab14fa77c6e4093f5015e567e0848c_0.webp)

### My others projects:
- [Bare Bones: Much Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/much-better-leaves-bare-bones)
- [Bare Bones: Team Abnormals Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/abnormals-bare-bones)

# [Credits](https://modrinth.com/mod/mace-but-3d)
